title: TBS Main Menu Override [DISCONTINUED]
description: A Resource Pack that removes the custom Main Menu background from The Broken Script
body:
This Resource Pack is an Addon for the [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script) Mod which removes the Main Menu Background Images that got added since TBS uses NeoForge 1.21.1

**You are allowed to use this Resource Pack in your own Modpacks**

## Compatibility

The Resource Pack currently supports the Mod Versions [1.9.4+mc1.21.1-beta.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script/version/1.9.4+mc1.21.1-beta.1) till [1.9.7+mc1.21.1-beta.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script/version/1.9.7+mc1.21.1-beta.1)

**This Resource Pack will only work with a custom FancyMenu background!**

## Why you should use this Resource Pack

*   You can disable the Background Images if you prefer the default Minecraft one
*   If you are a **Modpack Developer** the Resource Pack allows you to use FancyMenu instead of TBS overriding your own Background Images
*   If you use the RUS patches and don't want the glitch effect that enables automatically after configuring the TBS config, you can use this resourcepack

## Found an Issue?

Join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/VT65HnH9RF) and let us know!
